content: Phase 5 Cycle 4 (§5.5 deployment packaging) implemented — commit f6c066a. (1) Dockerfile: python:3.12-slim + uv, frozen-lock layered deps, git installed for git_ops, NON-ROOT runtime user (uid 10001), all mutable state consolidated under /data via BUGALIZER_DB_PATH/REPOS_DIR/CACHE_DIR env, HEALTHCHECK hits /health/live via the venv python (no curl in image); .dockerignore trims context to pyproject/lock/src. (2) docker-compose.yml: app-only per plan (Ollama stays NATIVE on the Windows host for GPU — container reaches it via BUGALIZER_OLLAMA_HOST=http://host.docker.internal:11434 with extra_hosts host-gateway for plain-Linux engines), ./data volume = one dir to back up, restart: unless-stopped, optional .env (required: false). (3) No-Docker fallback: NSSM service recipe + Task Scheduler variant in docs/deploy-windows.md §4. Enabling fix: config.py Settings now actually wires env_file='.env' — the class docstring has claimed .env support since Phase 1 but model_config never set it, so native (non-compose) deploys would silently ignore .env; real env vars still take precedence (pydantic-settings source order). Test hermeticity: new tests/conftest.py pins BUGALIZER_DB_PATH/QUEUE_ENABLED/API_KEYS/CORS_ORIGINS via env vars (which beat .env) so a developer's real .env can't flip auth or DB in the suite; test_config_tiering.py Settings() calls now pass _env_file=None; +1 test proving .env is read and env-var precedence. (4) Docs: docs/deploy-windows.md (Ollama-native install + model pull, API-key generation, Docker Desktop autostart note — what makes restart:unless-stopped survive reboot, NSSM recipe with AppDirectory rationale, netsh firewall rule, LAN curl submission examples incl. analysis_mode, cold-copy + sqlite3 .backup); docs/smoke-test.md (7 steps run FROM another LAN machine: reachability+auth-on check, project setup, dashboard-watched auto pipeline, hold + Analyze-local, one paid cloud escalation incl. the no-localization 409 guard, reboot survival, record in decision_log). README deploy section + dashboard link. Verified HERE (macOS): docker build succeeds; container boots, /health/live 200, dashboard 200 text/html, readiness shows database:true/worker:true (ollama:false expected — none attached), Docker healthcheck reports 'healthy', process runs as uid 10001. Full suite 191 passed. Scope note: the real-hardware smoke-test EXECUTION on the Windows box is deliberately not in this cycle — plan §5.5 marks it pending; its result in decision_log closes the phase. Files: Dockerfile, .dockerignore, docker-compose.yml (new), config.py, tests/conftest.py (new), tests/test_config_tiering.py, docs/deploy-windows.md + docs/smoke-test.md (new), plan §5.5, README, CLAUDE.md.

Approved. Reviewed Phase 5 Cycle 4 (§5.5) deployment packaging: Dockerfile, .dockerignore, docker-compose.yml, Settings .env support and test hermeticity, Windows Docker/NSSM deploy docs, smoke-test doc, .env.example coverage, and phase/README notes. Verified targeted config tests: uv run pytest tests/test_config_tiering.py -q (7 passed). Full suite passed: uv run pytest -q (191 passed). docker compose config validates. docker build -t bugalizer-review . succeeds.
